expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜子的板材尺寸。[宽度], [高度], [深度]为总体尺寸，[板材厚度]为顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度，[背板厚度]为背板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height],[Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah, dan Samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height],[Depth] คือการวัดทั้งหมด, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นไม้บน, ล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นไม้ด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là tổng kích thước, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu bảng Trên, Dưới và Bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu bảng Mặt sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinukwenta ang mga sukat ng board para sa cabinet. Ang [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay pangkalahatang sukat, ang [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal para sa Itaas, Ibaba, at Gilid ng board, at ang [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal para sa Likod ng board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: အံ့ဖွင့်ပစ္စည်းတွေရဲ့ အရွယ်အစားကို မှန်ကန်သည်။ [Width], [Height],[Depth] ကြီးမားသော အတိုင်းမိမိနှင့်ဆက်စပ်သည်, [BoardThick] သည်အထပ်, အောက်နှင့် ဘေးတွင်ပစ္စည်းထူသည်, [BackBoardThick] သည် အနောက်ဖေးပစ္စည်းထူသည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាតារាងទំហំសម្រាប់ទូរទស្សន៍។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជាតារាងសរុប, [BoardThick] គឺជាប្រវែងបន្ទាប់បន្សង្កត់លើ, បាត និងចំហៀង, [BackBoardThick] គឺជាប្រវែងស្រទាប់តែលើ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະໜາດກະດານທີ່ລະອຽດສຳລັບຕູ້. [Width], [Height],[Depth] ເປັນຂະໜາດທັງໝົດ, [BoardThick] ເປັນຄວາມຫນາສີຂອງກະດານດ້ານບນ, ລຸ່ມ, ແລະຂ້າງ, [BackBoardThick] ເປັນຄວາມຫນາຂອງກະດານຂະປັງ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットのボードサイズを計算します。[幅], [高さ], [奥行き]は全体の寸法であり、[BoardThick]はトップ、底、側面のボード材料の厚さ、[BackBoardThick]は背景のボード材料の厚さを表します。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 전체 측정값이며, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 보드 재료 두께를 나타내고, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 보드 재료 두께를 나타냅니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de los tableros para un armario. [Width], [Height], [Depth] son medidas totales, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material del tablero Superior, Inferior y Lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material del tablero de Fondo. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des panneaux pour une armoire. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sont des mesures totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des panneaux Haut, Bas et Latéraux, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau du panneau de Fond. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind Gesamtmaße, [BoardThick] ist die Dicke des Materials der Ober-, Unter- und Seitenplatten, [BackBoardThick] ist die Dicke des Hintergrundplattenmaterials. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करें। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप हैं, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] पिछली बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] — общие размеры, [BoardThick] — толщина материала верхних, нижних и боковых досок, [BackBoardThick] — толщина материала задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
